commit.message:
Improve cover ratio selection with nearest-match algorithm

Replace exact text match with ratio-value comparison: parse W:H strings
to floats and pick the option closest to the target ratio. Supports any
input format (3:4, 9:16, 0.75, etc). Falls back to exact text match if
the target cannot be parsed as a ratio.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Rewrite 7 pricing pages with verified March 2026 data and deep content

Cursor: Added Pro+ ($60), Ultra ($200), Enterprise tiers. Credit pool
system explained. Comparison table vs Windsurf/Copilot. 2,055 words.

GitHub Copilot: Added Pro+ ($39/mo, 1,500 premium requests). Premium
request system explained. Business vs Enterprise breakdown. 1,691 words.

Pinecone: Added $50/$500 monthly minimums, storage pricing ($0.33/GB),
read/write unit costs. Real cost examples. Self-hosted comparison.

Windsurf: Added credit system (25 free, 500 Pro), Enterprise ($60/user),
add-on credits ($10/250). Comparison table.

Cohere: Updated Command R+ to $2.50/$10, Embed v3 $0.10/1M, Rerank 3.5
$2/1K searches. Cross-provider comparison table.

AWS Bedrock: Full model pricing table (Claude, Llama, Mistral, Cohere).
Batch (50% off) and provisioned throughput options. Bedrock vs direct API.

Weaviate: Updated to Flex ($45/mo), Plus ($280/mo), Premium (custom)
structure. Self-hosted vs cloud comparison.

commit.message:
Adjust Y to -22.5deg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden Data Factory v2: 15 fixes for schema, validation, determinism, and GSIB quality

P0 critical: fix l1→l2 schema mismatch for counterparty/facility/agreement tables,
wire dead validateV2Output() into pipeline, replace Math.random() with seeded PRNG,
add RESERVED_RANGES for L2 surrogate-PK tables.

P1 high: add L1 reference code validation (credit_status, limit_status, collateral_type),
parameterize source_system_id via FACTORY_SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID constant across 13 generators,
fix LOAD_ORDER schema refs, add ecl_provision_snapshot to PK guesser, fix
counterparty_rating_observation PK (observation_id, not composite).

P2 medium: atomic JSON write for registry, route lender allocation IDs through IDRegistry,
add country/industry fallback warnings, add SET search_path to db-writer connect() and
SQL file output.

Verified: 32/32 scenarios pass validation, deterministic output confirmed (MD5 match).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use exact match only for MCQ/fill-in-blank and add scoring rubric (ql-avx)

MCQ and fill-in-blank no longer fall back to Claude evaluation on near-miss.
Wrong answers get immediate deterministic feedback instead of non-deterministic
LLM scoring. Translation and situational prompts now include explicit scoring
rubric with anchor examples (1.0/0.8/0.5/0.3/0.0) and a clear correct threshold
(>= 0.7) to reduce scoring variance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Adjust to Y -5, X 5, rotate 5, skewX -5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 툴바 SVG 아이콘 클릭 시 가구 선택 해제되는 문제 수정

캔버스 onPointerDown에서 button/input만 체크했는데,
툴바 버튼 내부의 SVG 요소(svg, path, rect)가 e.target이 되면
button 태그 체크를 통과하여 __r3fClickHandled=false가 설정됨.
→ onPointerUp에서 가구 선택 해제 + 팝업 닫기 발생.

target.closest('button') 체크를 추가하여 button 내부 SVG 클릭도 무시.

feat: component model UI layer — DomainContext and ValueStatement management (#344)

* Add component model data layer (Task 1)

* Fix issues found in adversarial review

- context_id type is now string | null (was string) — empty string was truthy
  and not a valid CUID, causing silent failures in any null-check downstream
- Migration index uses CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY to avoid write-lock on live
  definitions table
- Explicit onDelete: SetNull on domainContext relation matches migration SQL

commit.message:
fix: 자유배치 모드에서 가구 툴바 버튼 클릭 안 되는 문제 수정

1. FurnitureItem.tsx - 툴바 Html 컴포넌트에 occlude={false} 추가
   - FreePlacementDropZone의 투명 드래그 평면(z=0.02)이 툴바를
     가리는 것으로 감지되어 pointer-events가 비활성화되던 문제
   - zIndexRange=[10000, 10001]로 설정하여 다른 Html 요소보다 위에 배치
   - 툴바 z 위치를 depth/2 + 0.03으로 조정하여 드래그 평면보다 앞에 배치

2. FreePlacementDropZone.tsx - 드래그 평면에서 툴바 영역 클릭 무시
   - 가구 상단 150mm 영역(툴바 위치)에서는 드래그 시작하지 않음

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: eliminate N+1 queries and add missing database indexes (ql-4vk)

- lesson_session: consolidate 3 separate DB sessions in _get_curriculum_context
  into a single session (was: get_next_unit + get_unit_new_words + get_due_items
  each opening their own session and re-fetching the learner)
- review_session: replace fetch-all-then-slice with COUNT + LIMIT queries
- curriculum: combine two separate queries in check_unit_completion (unit words
  + mastered words) into a single query using a subquery with COUNT/CASE
- Add indexes on LearnerVocabulary.due_date, Conversation.updated_at,
  SessionRecord.created_at (migration 0008)

commit.message:
feat: validate batch exercise generation and fall back to individual on failure (ql-e4u)

- Enhanced _validate_exercise to check type-specific rules: MCQ and
  fill_in_blank require non-empty distractors; all string fields must
  be non-empty
- Replaced ValueError on batch validation failure with fallback to
  individual generate_exercise() calls, preserving any valid exercises
  from the batch attempt
- Updated tests to cover new validation rules and fallback behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix self-citation bug in HIJ recommendations

- Pass manuscript_title to _generate_recommendations_stream
- Add manuscript_info context to prompt with title
- Strengthen Section 2 rules to prevent self-citation
- Add explicit warning not to suggest citing the manuscript itself
- Reduce reference count from 5-8 to 3-5 (quality over quantity)
- Reinforce rules to ONLY use reference bank papers

This prevents the LLM from suggesting the user cite their own
uploaded paper as a "missing reference" (e.g., suggesting
Torti & Torti 2013 as a missing reference TO Torti & Torti 2013).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

   - R3F ConcurrentRoot가 store 변경을 감지하지 못해 3D 씬이
     새 가구를 렌더링하지 않던 문제 해결
   - 모든 return 경로에 notifyR3F() 추가

feat: multi-utilisateur — Teams, rôles, gestion d'équipe

BREAKING: refactor complet du modèle de données.
- Nouveau modèle Team (entreprise) avec infos partagées
- User a un rôle (admin/member) et appartient à une team
- Toutes les données scopées par teamId (clients, RDV, factures...)
- Appointment assigné à un membre spécifique (assignedToId)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase showcase card size

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add spreading activation search, RRF fusion, and graph analysis

Port from memory-index: spreading activation propagates energy from
vector search hits through the class dependency graph (2 hops, 0.7
decay, top-10 lateral inhibition). Results merged with vector ranking
via Reciprocal Rank Fusion. search_code now defaults to strategy=
"associative" (graph-expanded) with "semantic" opt-out for vector-only.

New analyze_codebase MCP tool exposes PageRank centrality (most central
classes in the dependency graph) and Louvain community detection
(discovers architectural modules automatically).

NetworkX added as dependency for graph algorithms. Cache invalidation
wired into all reindex paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace Leaflet map with pure SVG Uzbekistan map - no external dependencies

Leaflet CSS/JS from unpkg.com was being blocked in Telegram WebApp.
New approach: hardcoded SVG with 14 viloyat circles positioned geographically.
Click handlers call ochViloyatPanel() directly. No external libraries needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: default to passed=False on gateway evaluation error (ql-az9)

When Claude evaluation fails or returns unparseable JSON during gateway
tests, the system was defaulting to passed=True with score 0.5, allowing
learners to advance rings without earning it. Changed both the exception
handler and the _parse_evaluation fallback to default to passed=False
with score 0.0.

commit.message:
Update assessment-submit to post leads to /api/leads/ingest

Replaces old /api/leads POST (x-mc-secret) with the new dedicated
ingest endpoint (x-api-key: LEADS_INGEST_KEY). Sends name, email,
phone, company, industry, tier, source=Assessment, and a readable
notes string built from assessment answers (score, urgency, timeline,
budget, website/CRM/social status, pain point).

Fire-and-forget with try/catch — if Mission Control is down the
assessment still completes and both emails still send.

commit.message:
Replace hover carousel with JS scroll/click carousel

CSS :has() hover caused jitter when stack moved under cursor. Now
uses JS: scroll wheel on the stack cycles one position at a time
with a 600ms lock to prevent rapid switching. Click a card to select
it. Bouncy overshoot easing via CSS transition. Center card starts
active.

Add carousel hover — stack shifts with bouncy overshoot easing

Hover top card: whole stack slides down to put top card in center.
Hover bottom card: stack slides up. Uses cubic-bezier overshoot
easing for organic bounce-back feel. Pure CSS with :has() selector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix year-awareness bugs in HIJ recommendations and journal matching

Bug fixes:
1. Reference bank now filters by publication_year
   - For a 2013 paper, only suggests papers from 2003-2013
   - Added to_year param to OpenAlex search_works

2. Recommendations prompt now includes year context
   - Explicitly tells LLM the paper's publication year
   - Warns not to suggest citing papers from the future
   - Section 2 (Missing References) reinforces year constraint

3. Safe journals fallback now validates against keywords
   - _match_journals_from_db now accepts keywords and paper_type
   - Uses _validate_journal_fit to filter generic field journals
   - Ensures fallback journals are relevant to paper's subfield

This fixes the issue where a 2013 review was told to add
"2022-2023 mechanistic insights" as missing references.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: 도어 기본 색상이 캐비넷(내부) 텍스처로 fallback되는 문제 수정

도어 텍스처가 명시적으로 설정되지 않은 경우, interior texture로
fallback하지 않고 doorColor(단색)을 사용하도록 변경.
기존: effectiveTextureUrl = doorTextureUrl || textureUrl (interior)
수정: effectiveTextureUrl = doorTextureUrl (door 전용만)
